name: high_temp_only
expected_actions: High temperature detected. Check cooling system.

name: critical_temp_and_pressure_band
expected_actions: High temperature detected. Check cooling system.
CRITICAL: Shutdown recommended. Immediate inspection required.
Pressure is within nominal operating band.

name: fuel_and_mode
expected_actions: Restricted mission mode. Operator approval required.

name: critical_fuel_fire_and_sensor_degraded
expected_actions: CRITICAL FUEL LEVEL. Immediate refuel required.
ENGINE FIRE. Execute suppression procedure immediately.
Sensor status is degraded. Switch to redundant sensing and preserve evidence.
